$comment: The authoritative list of Stratos Games Factory agents. Adding a new agent = create agents/<name>/, add it here, update install.sh if it needs a cron. Nothing else.

agents.name: builder
agents.description: Processes build-request issues, runs Claude Code with the game's CLAUDE.md as context, opens PRs.

agents.name: council
agents.description: Reviews the week's factory activity, updates COUNCIL.md, files council-labeled issues for architectural improvements.

agents.name: qa
agents.script: agents/qa/ (deployed as .github/workflows/qa-agent.yml in each game repo)
agents.description: Playwright smoke tests on every PR: page loads, no console errors, game container present, screenshot artifact. Zero Claude tokens.

agents.name: content
agents.description: Generates 5 new content ideas per game and files them as build-request issues. Never writes code.

agents.name: competitor
agents.description: Scans trending puzzle/casual games via web search, files market-intel issues with 3 specific mechanic suggestions per game.

agents.name: platform
agents.description: On ship-it release: npx cap sync, attempts gradle assembleRelease, files release-ready issue with APK/AAB links.

agents.name: product
agents.description: Will pull Firebase Analytics + Crashlytics data and file data-backed improvement issues. Spec in agents/product/README.md.

agents.name: monetization
agents.description: Will analyze AdMob revenue + ad impression data and file ad-placement optimization issues. Spec in agents/monetization/README.md.

agents.name: ua
agents.description: Will generate localized store listings, screenshots, and ASO keyword suggestions on release. Spec in agents/ua/README.md.
